title: hellenia globosa
intro: Hellenia globosa, also known as Globe-flower or Globularia, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hellenia globosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal preparations to treat a range of health conditions.
